title: Receptionist cum Admin Assistant - MOE Secondary School  (JOB REF - ASRAWE-2026-01-001)
description:
Role:

This is a full-time, onsite, Admin Assistant Role in MOE Secondary School. If you are selected,

You will work closely with Admin Manager (AM) and School Leaders (SLs) in an MOE Secondary School (nearest MRT- Jurong East & Clementi ) in the day-to-day activities.
The company provides endless opportunities for career progression and better work - life balance.

Responsibilities:

1. Front desk reception duties such as answering/ transferring phone calls and attending to walk-in parents/ students / vendors

2. Issuing of keys to staff if require the use of special rooms

3. Record details of and attend to students who are unwell at sick bay

4. Contact parents if student is unwell

5. Record details of students who leave school early due to sickness and/or medical appointment and ensure that the early dismissal form is filled up

6. Record details of Lost & Found items in the “Lost & Found” file and track the movements at the end of every school term.

7. Receive delivery items and inform staff for collection from the General Office.

8. Collating list of students who have yet to collect testimonials

9. Manage the movements of school uniforms on loan to students.

10. Prepare signages for events and labels for rooms

11. Distribute mailers and any other materials required

12. Count food coupons for payment if required.

13. Other admin duties as and when assigned by the Supervisors/Administration

Manager/School Leaders.

Job Requirements:

1. Minimally ‘N’ Level Certificate or its equivalent, with a pass in English.

2. Valid first aid with CPR certification

3. Good communication and inter-personal skills with patience and ability to remain calm during challenging situations.

4. Possess initiative, good problem solving skills and ability to multitask

5. Ability to work independently and collaborate in a team

6. Proficient in using MS Office Applications, e.g. MS word, MS excel etc.

7. 2 years of similar working experience in a school environment.

The Personnel shall minimally have the following experience:

● 3 years of relevant experience in administration.


Summary:

Contract Period: From 01 Apr 2026 to 31 Mar 2027.

Working Hours:

• Mondays to Thursdays: 9:30am to 6:30pm, inclusive of 0.5hr lunch break

• Fridays: 10 am to 6:30pm, inclusive of 0.5hr lunch break

• Service not required on Saturdays, Sundays and gazetted public holidays.

Location : Jurong East & Clementi

postedCompany.description:
Lambda Computing Solutions (S) Pte Ltd. is a Singapore-based IT Consulting, Managed Services, Software Product Development and Technology Recruitment Company.  Lambda Computing provides information technology consulting and business process outsourcing services and offers software solutions and products in cutting edge technologies.


Our passion is to dedicate our global technology and innovation know-how, our industry expertise and worldwide resources to working together with clients to make their business stronger.


Our team has extensive experience across industries & is focused on Information Technology.


Our focused areas include:


-      Software product development primarily on full-stack development that consists of Java SE, Java EE, HTML5, CSS, JSF, Spring Web, Spring MVC, Spring Boot, Microservices, JavaScript, Node .js, Angular, React, AWS Cloud, Oracle, MySQL, MongoDB and CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, Maven, Git, Github, Bamboo.


-     IT consulting services to solve the customer’s problem by leveraging the expertise of our IT talent team.


It is a leading organization with expertise in Java, Oracle, UX Design, AI, IoT, BlockChain and AWS Cloud-based technologies. We are rapidly growing and looking for passionate and driven people to join us for various positions in Singapore.


Do you want to be a part of the dynamic team in IT consulting where technical expertise is combined with business intelligence to deliver better results? Do not hesitate to drop your CV to careers@lambdacompute.com to join our talent team.


Our single-minded Mission Statement:


To enable our global customers achieve their business objectives, empower and create value for them by delivering efficient and quality solutions through innovative, reliable and collaborative technology.


This is achievable by Lambda Computing Solutions by leveraging our knowledge through technology and implementing operational excellence.
postedCompany.name: LAMBDA COMPUTING SOLUTIONS (S) PTE. LTD.
